learning_outcomes: Understand compound interest theory and practice. | Apply contingent payment techniques to determine actuarial present values. | Develop and apply survival models. | Model and critically analyse scenarios involving financial risk. | Solve business problems that involve financial and actuarial risk. | Communicate effectively in written and oral forms to actuaries and other audiences. | Address business challenges in an ethical manner. | Collaborate effectively to achieve diverse purposes in a range of contexts.
